name: code-reviewer-ai-mcp
description: code-reviewer-ai-mcp — Review code for bugs and improvements.

tools.name: review_code
tools.description: Review code for bugs, security issues, and improvements. Returns categorized findings.

tools.name: check_security
tools.description: Scan code for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, hardcoded secrets, injection risks.

tools.name: suggest_improvements
tools.description: Suggest refactoring opportunities, performance improvements, and best practices.

tools.name: check_complexity
tools.description: Calculate cyclomatic complexity and identify overly complex functions.
